    2. mergeDPSAndER(Map, Map)

クラス OptimizerPipeline

java.lang.Object
mechanics.optimization.OptimizerPipeline
public class OptimizerPipeline extends Object
Orchestrates the two-phase artifact optimization pipeline. Phase 1 – ER Calibration

IterativeSimulator.optimizeER(Function, Consumer, int) is called with a sim factory that ignores the DPS roll map (null) so the heuristic artifact generator drives substat allocation. After convergence the pipeline inspects the resulting simulator to extract the exact number of liquid ER rolls each character required. These counts are stored in erRollsMap and are used to shrink each character's DPS roll budget in Phase 2. Phase 2 – DPS Hill-Climbing

IterativeSimulator.optimizeJointPartyCrit(Function, Consumer, Map, Map) performs coordinated single-roll swaps across all DPS characters. The sim factory passed to Phase 2 always merges the hill-climber's DPS rolls with the pre-reserved ER rolls via mergeDPSAndER(Map, Map), ensuring artifact stats are complete without allowing the optimizer to cannibalize ER budget.

The final TotalOptimizationResult contains the converged ER targets and the fully merged party roll map ready for the final simulation.

    private static Map<String, Map<StatType,Integer>>
    mergeDPSAndER(Map<String, Map<StatType,Integer>> dpsRolls, Map<String,Integer> erRollsMap)
    Merges per-character ER roll counts into a DPS roll map without mutating either input.
    static TotalOptimizationResult
    run(BiFunction<Map<String,Double>, Map<String, Map<StatType,Integer>>, CombatSimulator> simFactory, Consumer<CombatSimulator> rotationRunner, Map<String, List<StatType>> dpsCharsAndStats)
    Runs the full optimization pipeline: Phase 1 – ER calibration via iterative rotation simulation. Phase 2 – DPS hill-climbing with ER rolls pre-reserved per character.

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • OptimizerPipeline

      public OptimizerPipeline()

  • メソッドの詳細

    • run

      public static TotalOptimizationResult run(BiFunction<Map<String,Double>, Map<String, Map<StatType,Integer>>, CombatSimulator> simFactory, Consumer<CombatSimulator> rotationRunner, Map<String, List<StatType>> dpsCharsAndStats)
      Runs the full optimization pipeline:
      1. Phase 1 – ER calibration via iterative rotation simulation.
      2. Phase 2 – DPS hill-climbing with ER rolls pre-reserved per character.

      ER roll counts are extracted automatically from the heuristic artifacts produced by Phase 1 — no extra configuration needed. Each character's liquid roll budget in Phase 2 equals 20 - erRolls[char].

      パラメータ:
      simFactory - factory that accepts an ER target map and a DPS roll map and returns a fully configured simulator; either argument may be null during calibration
      rotationRunner - consumer that drives a complete rotation on the simulator
      dpsCharsAndStats - map of charName -> substats to optimize defining which characters participate in Phase 2 and which substats the hill-climber may vary
      戻り値:
      a TotalOptimizationResult containing the converged ER targets and the final merged party roll map

    • mergeDPSAndER

      private static Map<String, Map<StatType,Integer>> mergeDPSAndER(Map<String, Map<StatType,Integer>> dpsRolls, Map<String,Integer> erRollsMap)
      Merges per-character ER roll counts into a DPS roll map without mutating either input.

      For each character in erRollsMap with a positive roll count, the corresponding entry in the returned map will have ENERGY_RECHARGE -> erRolls added (or overwritten) so that the full artifact stat block is correct when passed to a simulator factory.

      パラメータ:
      dpsRolls - the DPS-optimized roll map produced by the hill-climber
      erRollsMap - the pre-reserved ER roll counts per character name
      戻り値:
      a new map with ER rolls merged into the DPS rolls for each character
